name: Nike Air Force 1 Low (Japan Exclusive)
description: Authentic Nike Air Force 1 Low from Japan. Limited Japan-exclusive colorway. Leather upper with Air-Sole cushioning.

name: Nike Dunk Low Retro
description: Classic Nike Dunk Low in premium leather. Japan release. Available in multiple colors.

name: Nike Air Max 90 (Japan Pack)
description: Nike Air Max 90 from the Japan-exclusive pack. Visible Air cushioning. Iconic silhouette.

name: GU Fluffy Knit Sweater
description: Soft fluffy knit sweater from GU. Available in multiple colors. Perfect for cold season. Oversized relaxed fit.

name: Uniqlo Airism Oversized T-Shirt
description: Authentic Uniqlo Airism oversized t-shirt. Ultra-lightweight and breathable. Moisture-wicking fabric.

name: GU Wide Leg Pants
description: GU wide-leg pants. Comfortable and stylish. Premium cotton blend. Available in black, beige, and navy.

name: Uniqlo Light Down Jacket
description: Lightweight Uniqlo down jacket. Packable design. 750 fill power. Warm without being bulky. Water-repellent.

name: Japanese Biore UV Aqua Rich SPF50+
description: Biore UV Aqua Rich watery essence sunscreen. SPF50+ PA++++. Lightweight, non-sticky, refreshing finish. 80g.

name: Japanese Sheet Mask Variety Pack (10pcs)
description: Assorted Japanese facial sheet masks. Infused with collagen, hyaluronic acid, and vitamin C. 10-piece pack.

name: Heroine Make Waterproof Eyeliner
description: Japanese Heroine Make waterproof liquid eyeliner. Ultra-fine 0.1mm tip. Smudge-proof and long-lasting. Black.

name: Onitsuka Tiger Mexico 66
description: Classic Onitsuka Tiger Mexico 66 sneakers. Japan-exclusive colorway. Iconic design. Comfortable sole.

name: GU Knit Cardigan
description: GU open-front knit cardigan. Soft acrylic blend. Oversized fit. Perfect layering piece for any outfit.
